title: Timothy Carlsson
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Timothy Carlsson''' wrote the backstory for [[Tian Chyler]] - with first name provided by [[Ian Tapley]] - appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

His alias is yoda's waiter on [[StarWars.com]].
